title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Language Lens: Debug Hypotheses
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js debug hypotheses increment in a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reduce failures, form falsifiable hypotheses, inspect state and stacks, repair causes, and rerun regression cases.
Create domain error types only when callers need stable programmatic distinctions and recovery actions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
